title: Smooth Optimized
description: The leading optimization modpack, meticulously crafted through extensive research and fine-tuned for pure performance.
body:
### **Smooth Optimized 🏎️✨ – The Ultimate Minecraft Performance Modpack**  

---

#### **🚀 Experience Minecraft Like Never Before!**  
Are you tired of lag, stuttering, and slow chunk loading ruining your Minecraft experience? Do you dream of **silky-smooth gameplay, stunning visuals, and lightning-fast performance**, all without needing a high-end PC? **Smooth Optimized** is the answer! This modpack is carefully designed to **maximize FPS, reduce input lag, and enhance performance** without sacrificing the beauty of your world.  

---

### **🔥 Unleash the Power of Optimization!**  
**Smooth Optimized** isn’t just another performance modpack—it’s a finely tuned masterpiece, **crafted to make Minecraft run as smoothly as possible**. Whether you're exploring vast landscapes, building intricate structures, or diving into intense battles, this modpack ensures **you never miss a frame**.  

✔️ **Higher FPS** – Enjoy **insanely high frame rates**, even on low-end PCs!  
✔️ **Zero Stutter Gameplay** – Say goodbye to annoying FPS drops and input lag.  
✔️ **Faster Chunk Loading** – Explore the world without waiting for terrain to render.  
✔️ **Optimized Resource Usage** – Smooth performance without unnecessary strain on your system.  

---

### **🎨 Enhanced Visuals Without Compromise**  
Why choose between performance and beauty when you can have both? *Smooth Optimized* comes with **carefully selected visual improvements** that keep Minecraft looking **gorgeous** while ensuring **peak performance**.  

🌿 **Crisp and Clear Textures** – Sharper details with no FPS loss.  
☀️ **Smooth Lighting and Shadows** – Enhancing the atmosphere while staying optimized.  
💦 **Beautiful Water and Clouds** – Improved rendering without extra lag.  
🔄 **Seamless Animations** – Every movement, every interaction, buttery smooth.  

---

### **🛠️ The Best Performance Mods, Handpicked for You**  
Each mod in this pack is chosen for **maximum efficiency and stability**. From **advanced rendering optimizations** to **memory management tweaks**, every detail is crafted to deliver the ultimate **Minecraft experience**.  

⚙️ **Better Multi-threading** – Uses your CPU efficiently to boost performance.  
🔧 **Reduced RAM Usage** – Smooth gameplay with lower memory requirements.  
🚄 **Faster World Generation** – No more waiting ages for chunks to load.  
🎯 **Optimized Entity Handling** – Less lag, even in mob-heavy areas.  

---

### **🌍 Perfect for All Playstyles**  
No matter how you enjoy Minecraft, *Smooth Optimized* ensures **you get the best experience possible**.  

🏡 **Builders** – **Instant block placement, smooth movement**, and faster world rendering for large projects.  
⚔️ **Adventurers** – **Explore vast terrains effortlessly** without frame drops.  
🛠️ **Redstone Engineers** – **Fluid interactions** with no delay in circuits.  
🎮 **Multiplayer Players** – Enjoy **low-latency, high-performance** gaming, even on servers.  

---

### **💨 Say Goodbye to Lag and Hello to Fun!**  
With *Smooth Optimized*, you won’t have to worry about **low FPS, slow rendering, or annoying stutters**. Whether you’re on a high-end PC or a low-spec laptop, this modpack **unlocks the full potential of Minecraft** and allows you to experience the game **as it was meant to be played**—fast, fluid, and breathtakingly beautiful.  

✅ **Compatible with most mods and shaders**  
✅ **Works with vanilla and modded Minecraft**  
✅ **Easy to install and configure**  
✅ **Regular updates for the latest optimizations**  

🌟 **Download *Smooth Optimized* today and take your Minecraft experience to the next level!** 🌟  


<details>
<summary>Included Mods</summary>

- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - Configuration Library for Minecraft Mods
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - The fastest and most compatible rendering optimization mod for Minecraft. Now available for both NeoForge and Fabric!
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) - Alternative Options Menu for Sodium
- [Starlight (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) - Rewrites the light engine to fix lighting performance and lighting errors
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - Reduce resource usage while Minecraft is in the background, idle, or on battery.
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - Sodium addon providing support for the Fabric Rendering API, based on Indigo
- [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps) - Clumps XP orbs together to reduce lag
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - A modern shader pack loader for Minecraft intended to be compatible with existing OptiFine shader packs
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - No-compromises game logic optimization mod. Well suited for clients and servers of all kinds. Now available for Fabric and NeoForge!
- [Dark Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-loading-screen) - Makes the loading screen darker.
- [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu) - Makes the game boot faster by deferring non-essential initialization
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/) - Lightweight and modular API providing common hooks and intercompatibility measures utilized by mods using the Fabric toolchain.
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra/) - A Sodium addon that adds features that shouldn't be in Sodium.
- [FPS Reducer](https://modrinth.com/mod/fps-reducer) - Reduce GPU and CPU usage automatically when no user operation exists.
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed.
- [WI Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/wi-zoom) - WI Zoom is a Minecraft mod offering up to 50x zoom with smooth camera movement.
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) - Adds dynamic lights to Minecraft as the most feature-complete and optimized dynamic lighting mod for Fabric.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Included Resource</summary>

- [Faithful 32x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x) - The original Minecraft texture feel, with double the resolution and double the fun!

</details>


<details>
<summary>Other Notes</summary>

### **Minecraft: Java Edition**
#### **Minimum Requirements:**
- **OS:** Windows 10/11, macOS, or Linux  
- **CPU:** Intel Core i3-3210 / AMD A8-7600 or equivalent  
- **RAM:** 4 GB  
- **GPU:** Intel HD Graphics 4000 / AMD Radeon R5 with OpenGL 4.4 support  
- **Storage:** At least 1 GB (plus space for game saves and mods)  
- **Java Version:** Latest version recommended  

#### **Recommended Requirements:**
- **OS:** Windows 10/11, macOS, or Linux  
- **CPU:** Intel Core i5-4690 / AMD A10-7800 or better  
- **RAM:** 8 GB or more  
- **GPU:** NVIDIA GeForce 700 series / AMD Radeon Rx 200 series or better  
- **Storage:** SSD recommended  

</details>
